name: AggregateCommitPolicy
documentation:
Controls when aggregate changes are committed and whether multiple commits in the same completion phase may run
 concurrently.

fields.name: AWAIT_AFTER_HANDLER_COMMITS_BEFORE_RESULTS_PROPERTY
fields.documentation:
Controls whether request results wait for asynchronous aggregate commits that were started after a handler and are awaited at batch completion.

This applies to {@link #ASYNC_AFTER_HANDLER_AWAIT_AFTER_BATCH}. It does not delay results for {@link #SYNC_AFTER_BATCH}, because those commits only start at batch completion.

Set {@code fluxzero.aggregate.awaitAfterHandlerCommitsBeforeResults=false} to publish results immediately while preserving the aggregate commit policy's batch-completion wait. Defaults to {@code true}.

methods.name: afterBatch
methods.documentation: Returns whether this policy commits at batch completion rather than handler completion.

methods.name: async
methods.documentation: Returns whether this policy allows commits from the same completion phase to run concurrently.

methods.name: awaitAfterBatch
methods.documentation:
Returns whether this policy waits for commit completion at batch completion rather than handler completion.

When this is {@code true}, active thread-local aggregates are retained until batch completion as well, so later handlers in the same batch keep seeing the in-memory aggregate until pending commits have completed.

methods.name: commitAfterBatch
methods.documentation: Returns whether this policy commits at batch completion rather than handler completion.

enumConstants.name: ASYNC_AFTER_BATCH
enumConstants.documentation:
Start commits at the end of the current message batch and wait for all started commits before the batch
 completion phase finishes.

enumConstants.name: ASYNC_AFTER_HANDLER
enumConstants.documentation: Start commits after every handler and wait for all started commits at the end of the handler completion phase.

enumConstants.name: ASYNC_AFTER_HANDLER_AWAIT_AFTER_BATCH
enumConstants.documentation:
Start commits after every handler, keep the aggregate active for the rest of the current batch, and wait for all
 started commits at the end of the batch completion phase.

enumConstants.name: DEFAULT
enumConstants.documentation: Resolve the policy from the active Fluxzero defaults version or explicit application properties.

enumConstants.name: SYNC_AFTER_BATCH
enumConstants.documentation: Commit at the end of the current message batch and wait for each commit before continuing.

enumConstants.name: SYNC_AFTER_HANDLER
enumConstants.documentation: Commit after every handler and wait for that commit before the handler completion phase finishes.
